formulas.ideal_weight_kg: var total_in = height_ft * 12 + height_in; var base = gender == 1 ? 50 + 2.3*(total_in - 60) : 45.5 + 2.3*(total_in - 60); var factor = body_frame == 1 ? 0.9 : (body_frame == 2 ? 1.0 : 1.1); return base * factor;
formulas.ideal_weight_lbs: var total_in = height_ft * 12 + height_in; var base = gender == 1 ? 50 + 2.3*(total_in - 60) : 45.5 + 2.3*(total_in - 60); var factor = body_frame == 1 ? 0.9 : (body_frame == 2 ? 1.0 : 1.1); var kg = base * factor; return kg * 2.20462;
formulas.bmi: var total_in = height_ft * 12 + height_in; var base = gender == 1 ? 50 + 2.3*(total_in - 60) : 45.5 + 2.3*(total_in - 60); var factor = body_frame == 1 ? 0.9 : (body_frame == 2 ? 1.0 : 1.1); var kg = base * factor; var m = total_in * 0.0254; return kg / (m * m);
